headline: SKYX Reports Another Record Quarter with Revenue of $25 Million in Q-4 Demonstrating 8 Consecutive Quarters of Year Over Year Growth with Annual Record Revenue of $92 Million in 2025 Compared to $86 Million in 2024 as it Continues to Grow its Market Penetration
summary: Gross Profit Increased to $28 Million in 2025 Compared to $25 Million in 2024, Representing a $3 Million (13%) Increase in Gross Profit Operating Cash Used in 2025 Amounted to $13 Million Compared to $18 Million in 2024, Representing a $5 Million (27%) Reduction in Cash Used in Operating Activities SKYX Raised $29 Million in Q1 2026 Investments from Fundamental Institutions SKYX Announced Collaboration with NVIDIA AI Ecosystem Connect Program, Expecting to Grow Its Collaboration with NVIDIA into

headline: How Goode Foods went from family biz to viral brand
summary: Andrew Johnson, CEO of Goode Foods, sits down with Host Elizabeth Gore for a candid conversation about second-generation entrepreneurship, resilience, and innovation in a legacy industry. Now at the helm, Andrew opens up about stepping into leadership after his father’s passing, balancing family and business, and learning to become the face of the brand in a modern, digital-first world.

headline: We Visited a New Target Store. Old Problems Remain.
summary: A new Target store in New Jersey highlights ongoing customer frustrations, from confusing promotions to persistent in-store issues.

headline: Growvana and The Beachwaver Co. Announce Strategic Partnership to Expand Across Digital and Retail Commerce
summary: Growvana the only omnichannel operating layer designed to help modern brands scale across digital and physical commerce, today announced a strategic partnership with The Beachwaver Co, the women-owned beauty brand widely recognized for reshaping the hair styling category through product innovation, founder-led storytelling, and deep consumer loyalty.

headline: Assessing Target (TGT) Valuation As New Management And Analyst Optimism Refocus Investor Attention
summary: Why Target (TGT) is Back in Focus Target (TGT) is back on investors’ radar after high profile commentary highlighted operational improvement under new leadership, with plans to lift margins and earnings that are drawing fresh attention to the stock’s recent performance. See our latest analysis for Target. Against this backdrop, Target’s share price has climbed 20.55% over the past 90 days and 15.78% year to date. The 1 year total shareholder return of 14.72% contrasts with weaker 3 and 5 year...
